title: paspalum sanguinale var. commutatum
intro: Paspalum sanguinale var. commutatum, also known as red fescue or Commutatum Paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The health benefits of Paspalum sanguinale var. commutatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
